scored_claims.claim: Samsung Electronics 2014全年業績：売上KRW 206.2T、営業利益KRW 25.0T。Memory事業EBITDA率50%超。SSD売上$1B+/四半期達成（2014 H1以降）
scored_claims.evidence: Q4 2014 CFO: 'FY2014 revenue KRW 206T, operating profit KRW 25T. Memory division maintained strong profitability. SSD revenue has exceeded $1 billion per quarter since first half of 2014.'
scored_claims.overall_reasoning: factual_claim。CFO開示の財務事実。SSD $1B/Q以上達成はV-NAND技術力の市場検証として重要。KRW 206T売上・KRW 25T営業利益は定量的に検証可能。70%

scored_claims.claim: Samsung Electronics 株主還元強化：KRW 11.3T特別買戻し（2015Q3発表）+ 3年間FCFの30-50%還元方針。2014年から配当2.5倍増
scored_claims.evidence: Q3 2015 CEO: 'Board approved KRW 11.3T special share buyback program. Committing to return 30-50% of free cash flow over the next 3 years.' Q4 2014: 'Dividends increased by 2.5x compared to previous year.'
scored_claims.overall_reasoning: factual_claim。CEO/Board発表の数値事実。KRW 11.3T買戻しと30-50% FCF還元方針は定量的に検証可能。半導体事業の高キャッシュ創出能力の証左として参照可能。70%
